summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Golden Panther tattoo artist landing page. Backend API 80% functional with minor email validation issue. Frontend 95%+ functional with excellent responsive design and full feature implementation.

validation_bugs.issue: Email format validation not working - accepts invalid email formats
validation_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 422 for invalid email formats like 'invalid-email-format'

validation_issues.issue: Custom validation error message not showing for empty required fields
validation_issues.expected_behavior: Should show 'Please fill in all required fields' toast message
validation_issues.current_behavior: HTML5 validation prevents submission but custom message doesn't appear

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections: Hero, About, Portfolio, Studio, Inquiry, Footer
Navigation header with working links to all sections
Hero section displays Bruna name, tagline, and CTA button correctly
About section shows artist bio, portrait image, and specialty tags
Portfolio section displays bento grid with 6 images and grayscale-to-color hover effect
Studio section shows correct address (Rua da Firmeza, 457, 2º andar, Porto), email, hours
Instagram links (@sabadinnk) work correctly in Portfolio and Footer sections
Tattoo inquiry form accepts all field types and submits successfully
POST /api/inquiries stores inquiries in MongoDB and returns proper response
Form submission shows success toast notification
Navigation smooth scroll works when clicking nav links
Mobile menu toggle opens/closes navigation correctly
Backend API root endpoint returns correct message
Required field validation works (rejects missing name field)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Add proper email format validation in backend Pydantic model to reject invalid email formats with 422 status code
